'''Zim Systems''' was a manufacturer existing in the [[Old Republic era|days]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], that manufactured explosives and personal [[Rocket pack/Legends|rocket packs]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Products==
*[[ROCKET]] personal rocket pack
